results.definition_en: The bright thing in the day sky that gives heat and light to the earth.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 太陽;日間天空中為地球供熱與光的明亮星體。
results.example_en: The sun came up over the hills.

results.definition_en: A flat top on legs, used for eating, writing, or putting things on.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 桌子;具腿支撐的扁平面板，可用於進食、書寫或擺物。
results.example_en: Put the plate on the table.

results.definition_en: The long thin part at the back end of an animal.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 尾巴;動物身後的長條部位。
results.example_en: The dog gave a happy tail wag.
results.example_zh_tw: 那隻狗開心地搖了搖尾巴。

results.definition_en: A very thin long line of cotton or silk, used to sew.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 線;以棉或絲製、用以縫紉的細長線。
results.example_en: Put thread through the needle.

results.definition_en: The front part of the neck, inside which one swallows.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 喉嚨;頸前供吞嚥之處。
results.example_en: I have a sore throat today.

results.definition_en: The short fat finger at the side of the hand.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 拇指;手側短而粗的手指。
results.example_en: She hurt her thumb when cutting bread.
results.example_zh_tw: 她切麵包時弄傷了拇指。

results.definition_en: A small piece of paper that lets one go on a train or into a show.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 車票、入場券;允許搭車或觀演的小張紙。
results.example_en: Buy a ticket before getting on the train.

results.definition_en: One of the five short parts at the end of each foot.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 腳趾;足端的五個短小部位之一。
results.example_en: I broke a toe on the door.

results.definition_en: The long soft thing inside the mouth, used to talk and taste.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 舌頭;口中柔軟的長物，用以說話與品味。
results.example_en: She put out her tongue at me.

results.definition_en: One of the white hard things in the mouth, used to bite food.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 牙齒;口中白色堅硬之物，用以咬食。
results.example_en: I lost a tooth at the dentist.
results.example_zh_tw: 我在牙醫那裡掉了一顆牙。

results.definition_en: A place where many people live and work, smaller than a city.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 城鎮;居民與工商眾多之處，較城市小。
results.example_en: I grew up in a small town.

results.definition_en: A long line of carriages pulled by an engine on rails.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 火車;由機車牽引、行於軌道之長串車廂。
results.example_en: The train comes into the station.

results.definition_en: A flat thing with low sides, used to carry food or other small things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 托盤;邊緣低淺的扁平器具，用以盛物。
results.example_en: Bring the tray of food to the table.

results.definition_en: A tall plant with a hard stem and many branches and leaves.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 樹;高大、具硬幹與多枝葉的植物。
results.example_en: The big tree gives good shade.

results.definition_en: A piece of clothing for the legs, that covers from the waist down.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 長褲;自腰部往下覆蓋雙腿的衣物。
results.example_en: He wears black trousers to work.

results.definition_en: A round cover with a stick under it, used to keep the rain off.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 雨傘;帶柄的圓蓋，用以擋雨。
results.example_en: Take an umbrella, the rain may come.

results.definition_en: A high flat side of a room or building, or a stone fence.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 牆;房間或建築的扁平側面，或石製圍牆。
results.example_en: Put the picture on the wall.

results.definition_en: A small thing worn on the wrist that tells the time.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 手錶;戴於手腕、顯示時間的小型裝置。
results.example_en: My watch is fast by ten minutes.

results.definition_en: A round thing that turns and is used to move cars or other things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 輪子、車輪;可轉動以推進車輛之圓形物。
results.example_en: The car has four wheels.

results.definition_en: A long thin tool used to hit, often with a string at the end.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鞭子;末端常帶繩、用以鞭打的長條工具。
results.example_en: The driver used a whip on the horse.

results.definition_en: A small thing that gives a sharp high sound when air is blown through it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 哨子;以氣吹之即發尖銳高聲的小器具。
results.example_en: The teacher blew the whistle.

results.definition_en: An opening in a wall with glass in it, that lets light in.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 窗戶;牆上有玻璃的開口，可透光入內。
results.example_en: Open the window for fresh air.

results.definition_en: The part of a bird, insect, or aircraft used to fly.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 翅膀、機翼;鳥、昆蟲或飛機用以飛行之部位。
results.example_en: The bird had a hurt wing.

results.definition_en: A long thin piece of metal, that bends easily.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 電線、鐵絲;易於彎曲的細長金屬。
results.example_en: Tie the box up with wire.

results.definition_en: A long thin animal with no legs, that lives in the earth.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 蚯蚓、蠕蟲;長條無腳、棲息於土中的動物。
results.example_en: A worm came out of the wet ground.
results.example_zh_tw: 一條蚯蚓從濕土裡冒出來。
